name: French Peas
recipeInstructions:
1. Melt butter in a saucepan.
2. Slice the lettuce into long shreds.
3. Add half of the shredded lettuce to the melted butter.
4. Stir in the remaining ingredients: sugar, green onions, water, rosemary (fresh or dried), garlic, pepper, flour, and salt.
5. Spread the rest of the shredded lettuce on top.
6. Cover and bring the mixture to a boil.
7. Lower the heat and simmer for 15 minutes, stirring 2 to 3 times.
8. Serves 4.
